name: omatic-server
description: O-Matic Server connection — bundled PostgreSQL + pgvector MCP server for OpenAI Codex. Ships Probot (orchestrator), Fred (storage + connection CRUD), and Data (analyst + DBA) skills.

interface.shortDescription: Connect Codex to an O-Matic factory brain.
interface.longDescription: Bundles the O-Matic Server MCP layer for OpenAI Codex. It resolves a project-bound factory, reports startup and connector health, searches factory memory, manages task and decision records, and exposes guarded SQL against the configured PostgreSQL + pgvector factory brain.
